textarea.placeholder: Add notes about this lead — call summaries, preferences, follow-up reminders…

t.div: No messages or log notes yet.

Session is at capacity.
Override capacity and book anyway

div.p: Check tags to add, or mark them to remove from selected leads.

t.t-value: state.stageLeads[stage.id] or { leads: [], total: 0, loading: false, offset: 0 }

div.div: Toggle the background workflows that keep your pipeline moving.

t.div: View-only — only administrators can change automations.

div.div: Templates targeting CRM Lead. Manage them in Email Marketing & SMS Marketing.

t.div:
No email templates target CRM Lead yet.
Open Email Templates →

No SMS templates target CRM Lead yet.
Open SMS Templates →
